title: Applications Specialist-Isolation/Actuation
description: Applications Specialist-Isolation/Actuation Process Management Limited-A Puffer Company Couva/Point Lisas Not disclosed Permanent full-time Updated 03/02/2026 Apply Now Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save Applications Specialist-Isolation/Actuation JOB SUMMARY : As an Applications Specialist – Isolation/Actuation , the job holder will work with a dynamic team to meet the strategic objectives of the Isolation Business Unit. He/She will be required to execute engineering activities related to Isolation Valves and its accessories. This requires assisting in the development of the Emerson and Non-Emerson Isolation product lines, which includes ongoing interaction with all industrial customers to provide Engineering and Technical solutions to meet their specific needs. PRIMARY DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES: Build and maintain excellent business relationships with Suppliers and Customers. Sizing/Selection of Equipment related to the Isolation/Actuation Business Unit. Sizing Actuators for Integrated Valve Packages. Modification of existing Isolation Valves, Actuators and Valve Accessories. Assist in developing the Solenoid and Switchbox Accounts. Prepare customers’ proposals and meet to discuss projects and tenders. Conduct site visits to gather information for engineered equipment. Keep abreast of activities and developments by competitors. Conduct marketing activities with prospective clients together with the relevant Account Manager, Technical Solutions Supervisor and Department Manager. Troubleshoot problems relating to Isolation Valves, Actuators and Actuator Accessories. Ensure accurate and timely delivery of products and services. Assist with inventory management and pricing. Educate customers and employees on Isolation Valves, Integrated Valve Packages and relevant Codes and Standards. All other reasonable and related responsibilities as assigned. SECONDARY DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES: Assist with marketing and strategic planning as required. Assist with developing and conducting effective demonstrations/seminars and communicates technical information on all products and services in direct line of responsibility. Interact with other internal teams to optimize team performance, identify opportunities for new business, identify opportunities for work process improvement, ensure open communication between group members, as well as support improvement of internal work practices. QUALIFICATIONS AND EXPERIENCE: A minimum of a Technician’s Diploma in Mechanical or related Engineering Discipline or equivalent, from an Accredited institution. A minimum of Two (2) Years' experience in providing relevant technical / industrial customer support, in a sales-based environment or Process plant operations. KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS AND PERSONAL ATTRIBUTES: Knowledge: Excellent knowledge of elements used in the energy industry. General knowledge of the sales process, products and services. Critical Skills: Exhibits excellent written & oral communication and presentation skills. Strategic thinker with solid technical skills. Excellent interpersonal skills including engaged listening, questioning and discovery skills. Good judgement, approaches opportunities strategically and exhibits problem-solving skills. Ability to manage customer expectations relative to deliverables and timeframes. Strong customer service skills, including the ability to develop rapport and trust. Demonstrated attention to detail. Computer Literacy (MS Suite). Use of Customer Portals. Complementary Skills : Strong self-management skills to include dependability, initiative, innovation, professionalism and organization skills. Effective Learning. Logical Thinking. Attentiveness. Personal Attributes: Effective time management. Ability to multitask and prioritize work activities in a fast- paced environment. Flexibility to changing demands. Assertiveness. Honest, trustworthy and a strong work ethic. Team player. OTHER WORK-RELATED REQUIREMENTS/CONDITIONS: Work to be executed primarily in an office environment, with frequent field visits to customer sites. Work may also be executed remotely, via specific technology platforms. Other conditions include: Extensive sitting with long hours on desk duties. The ability to use hands to handle and control office objects, tools, and equipment.  Repeating motions may include the wrists, hands and/or fingers. The ability to wear the minimum level of required Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) without restriction, which may include but is not limited to, safety glasses and hearing protection where applicable. The ability to wear a safety helmet without restriction at customer sites, where required. The ability to perform work with occasional walking, standing, reaching and climbing on heights. The possibility of working in a fast-paced environment with multiple deadlines. The possibility of planned or unexpected work assignments outside of regular working hours/days. Driving in varying traffic and weather conditions. Traversing long distances with varying road conditions We wish to thank all applicants for their interest in this vacancy, however ONLY suitable applications will be considered. Deadline Date for Applications: 17 th February 2026 Ref: Applications Specialist-Isolation/Actuation Apply Now

title: Process Management Limited-A Puffer Company
description: Process Management Limited-A Puffer Company Process Management Limited (PML), a Puffer-Sweiven Company, is a leading provider of process automation, valve, instrumentation and reliability solutions. We are the local business partner of Emerson in Trinidad & Tobago, Barbados, Guyana and Suriname. Our markets include Upstream Oil & Gas, Midstream & Refining, Petrochemical, Power & Water, Metals & Mining, Food & Beverage. As Emerson’s local business partner, we are on the cutting edge of innovation and technology allowing us to take on industry’s toughest challenges and bring predictable success to our clients; expertly serving our Energy Sector stakeholders. PML is a total solutions provider: our engineered products and solutions are designed to best fit each customer’s specific requirements through understanding their needs and recommending optimized solutions to improve operational efficiency. In 1995, shortly after Fisher Controls and Rosemount Incorporated merged, PML was formed and appointed the Local Business Partner for Fisher Rosemount. In April 2001 our principals Fisher Rosemount changed their name to Emerson Process Management, with a further change to Emerson Automation Solutions in 2018. Through the stewardship and vision of our directors, PML has grown to be the leader in Process Automation and Instrumentation. In 2023, Puffer- Sweiven , a prominent provider of industrial automation solutions in the Texas Gulf coast and Central Texas are in USA, acquired PML. This acquisition has brought together two well-recognized companies in the process automation industry, combining both companies’ respective strengths and expertise with the primary aim of optimizing value to our valued customers and stakeholders. title: DATA ENGINEER - ANSA McAL LIMITED
description: DATA ENGINEER - ANSA McAL LIMITED ANSA McAL Group of Companies Port-of-Spain Not disclosed Permanent full-time Updated 03/02/2026 Human Resources Log in or register to apply Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save ANSA McAL Limited is seeking a highly qualified Data Engineer to join our team! Job Summary We are seeking an individual with strong technical proficiency for designing, building and maintaining the infrastructure and systems required for collecting, storing and analysing data efficiently. Effective communication skills are essential for articulating findings and supporting data-driven decision-making across the organization. Additionally, the candidate should demonstrate strong time management skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with stakeholders across various departments. Key Responsibilities Database Management Manage scalable data pipelines for processing large datasets. Ensure data is clean, consistent, and accessible to analysts and data scientists. Create and maintain databases and data warehouses (e.g., relational databases, data lakes). Optimize storage solutions for performance and cost. Integrate data from multiple sources, such as APls, sensors, and legacy systems. Ensure data compatibility and proper schema design. Collection and Management: Gather data from various sources, including databases, spreadsheets, APls, and external sources. Clean and preprocess data, ensuring data accuracy and completeness. Maintain data integrity through quality checks, data validation, and proper data storage. Collaboration and Cross-Functional Support: Work closely with IT and others to optimize reporting mechanisms. Work with stakeholders (e.g., data scientists, business analysts, software developers) to understand data requirements. Coordinate with cloud architects and system administrators for resource allocation Qualifications & Experience The following are qualifications and experience that are considered essential for the job: Minimum of Bachelor’s Degree in Data Engineering, Computer Science or related field 3+ years of experience building and maintaining data flows, data pipelines, warehouses, lakehouses, specifically Azure cloud technologies. Preference will be given to Microsoft certified candidates 3+ years experience maintaining Azure DevOps for development team 5+ years experience python programming 5+ years experience SQL programming 5+ Database design 5+ years experience test-driven development Knowledge of data warehousing and database management Data Visualisation e.g. using Power BI, Tableau or Qlik Systematic thinking and problem-solving abilities Strong communication and collaboration skills are crucial, as the role involves working closely with cross­ functional teams, including data scientists, analysts, and business stakeholders, to understand requirements and deliver scalable solutions. Keeps abreast with industry trends While not essential, we are particularly interested in candidates with the following qualifications: Certification in Microsoft Fabric Data Engineering or similar Experience in designing and maintaining data lakes Familiar with or worked with Project Management methodologies, ideally with those incorporating Agile principles Understanding of the legal and regulatory requirements for data protection across the different data jurisdictions that ANSA McAL operates, to ensure that data is adequately protected in transit and at rest At least three years’ experience working within a sector that ANSA McAL operates e.g. construction, manufacturing, beverage, banking, insurance etc. This job description may not be inclusive of all assigned duties, responsibilities, or aspects of the job described, and may be amended at any time at the sole discretion of the Employer. title: Project Manager
description: Project Manager National Commercial Bank of Anguilla Anguilla Not disclosed Contract Updated 12/02/2026 Human Resources Apply Now Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save Project Manager CAREER OPPORTUNITY:  PROJECT MANAGER Position Description: The National Commercial Bank of Anguilla Ltd (NCBA), the leading financial institution in Anguilla, is seeking a suitably qualified and experienced individual to fill the position of Project Manager . The Project Manager is responsible for identifying, organizing, prioritizing, authorizing, managing, and controlling projects and programs to achieve specific strategic business objectives The position key accountabilities and required competency levels: Develop project scope, cost estimates, human resource requirements, work plans, time schedules, communication plans, and makes work assignments to meet project or program objectives. Conducts risk assessments; reports identified risks to management; provides recommendations for mitigation of risk (including termination of the project if appropriate). Coordinate with cross-discipline team members to make sure that all parties are on track with project requirements, deadlines, and schedules. Establish and monitor program priorities, objectives, and procedures, determining area objectives, targets of service, and resource needs allocation. Provide leadership and direction to the functional team so that tasks and activities are coordinated for project scope control, quality control, communication management, change control management, risk management and issue management. Escalate impediments, manages risk, helps ensure value delivery, and helps drive relentless improvement. Coordinate work activities by scheduling staff assignments, setting the work priorities, and directing the work of project resources, (including contractual) in the development of new information technology systems and enhancements to existing systems. Sets and tracks project milestones; manages and accounts for unforeseen delays, then realigns schedules and expectations as needed. Establishes and implements project communication plans, providing status updates to concerned staff and stakeholders. Collects, analyzes, and summarizes information and trends as needed to prepare project status reports. Preparing requests for proposals and conducting all necessary meetings to facilitate selection of project services and products Meet with project team members to identify and resolve issues. Submit project deliverables and ensuring that they adhere to quality standards. Manage and Coordinate project technical teams engaged in the development of Information Technology projects. Prepare status reports by gathering, analyzing, and summarizing relevant information. Establish effective project communication plans and ensuring their execution. Prepares and implements a budget based on estimates Facilitate change requests to ensure that all parties are informed of the impacts on schedule and budget. Coordinate the development of user manuals, training materials, and other documents as needed to enable successful implementation and turnover of the process or system to the clients. Provide technical advice and guidance for all I.T. related projects for the Bank Identify and developing new opportunities with clients. Work with all Managers/Section Heads to ensure project delivery with deadlines The ideal candidate must possess the following qualifications and background: a)     BSc Project Management or Computer Science b)     Thorough understanding of project management fundamentals. c)     Understanding of software development life cycle. d)     Comptia Project+, CAPM, or Project Management Professional (PMP) certification.. e)     Minimum three (3) years’ experience in project management in a managerial role f)      Proven experience in project management. g)     Ability to lead project teams of various sizes and see them through to completion. h)    Strong understanding of formal project management methodologies. title: Project Manager
description: Project Manager RealDecoy Kingston and St. Andrew / St. Catherine Not disclosed Permanent full-time Updated 27/01/2026 HR Log in or register to apply Share Share this job Facebook Twitter Report This Job Save Save Lead end-to-end delivery of software and client projects, from discovery and requirements through UX, development, QA, and deployment. Own scope, uphold quality, and drive successful outcomes. BUSINESS CONTEXT RealDecoy is a professional services company based in Ottawa, Canada, with a key office in Jamaica. We specialize in transforming information into meaningful digital experiences for our clients. Every engagement is tailored; every relationship is personal. This has earned us long-standing clients, strong referrals, and the opportunity to solve complex business challenges with modern technology. We are led by our values WE LEAD, WE LEARN, and WE CARE, and this is reflected daily in our culture and our interactions. These values guide how we collaborate, how we support each other, and how we show up for our clients. At RealDecoy, we believe great ideas can come from anyone. Our culture is collaborative, people-centric, and rooted in continuous learning. We expect every team member to share knowledge generously, ask questions courageously, and contribute to an environment where growth, curiosity, and quality thrive. YOUR CHALLENGE As a Project Manager, you will lead the end-to-end delivery of software development and client services projects from requirements analysis and business discovery through UX design, development, QA, and deployment. You are the owner of scope, the guardian of quality, and the driver of outcomes. This role requires a go-getter with strong organizational skills, exceptional communication abilities, and the confidence to lead cross-functional and geographically distributed teams. You will work closely with clients and your team to understand business goals, translate them into technical requirements, and ensure successful delivery. You must be fearless in escalating risks, firm but tactful in managing scope, and committed to continuous improvement. You make things happen. Does this sound like you?  Read on for a detailed description of the role and how to apply! Your primary responsibilities will include: JOB DUTIES Project Leadership & Delivery Lead and manage multiple concurrent software projects from initiation to closeout. Develop, maintain, and monitor comprehensive project plans, schedules, milestones, and resource allocations. Ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, within scope, and to quality standards. Prepare and share project status reports, including progress, risks, issues, and mitigations, with internal and external stakeholders. Perform proactive risk identification, assessment, and mitigation throughout the project lifecycle. Business Analysis & Requirements Management Facilitate requirements discovery sessions with clients and internal teams. Work with the team to translate business needs into clear, actionable technical requirements and user stories. Validate requirements and ensure alignment with business objectives and technical feasibility. Stakeholder Management Serve as the primary point of contact between RealDecoy and the client for the duration of each project. Build and maintain strong stakeholder relationships through transparency, clarity, and accountability. Manage expectations and negotiate scope changes with tact and firmness. Communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical audiences, adjusting your style as needed. Team Leadership & Collaboration Inspire and motivate project teams, helping them stay aligned with project goals and timelines. Delegate tasks effectively and foster a collaborative environment across dispersed teams. Hold team members and stakeholders accountable for deliverables and commitments. Contribute to RealDecoy’s learning culture through knowledge sharing, mentorship, and continuous improvement. Quality & Budget Oversight Define and uphold quality standards for project outputs. Monitor budget performance, track variances, and ensure financial documentation accuracy. Participate in post-project reviews to identify lessons learned and organizational improvements. QUALIFICATIONS To Meet Your Challenge, You Will Have: Bachelor’s degree or college diploma with 3–5 years of project management experience. Demonstrated experience managing software or web application development projects. Experience delivering increasingly complex projects and tailoring delivery approaches to the project context. Strong customer-engagement and relationship-building skills. Strong organizational, multitasking, and time-management abilities. Excellent verbal and written communication skills. Ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical audiences. Experience (formal or informal) in business analysis, including requirements elicitation and documentation. It Would Be Great If You Also Have: CAPM or PMP certification Knowledge of Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) Experience with project management tools (JIRA, Confluence, MS Project, MS SharePoint, MS Teams) Understanding of QA processes and continuous improvement practices. PEOPLE & LEARNING CULTURE We have a very strong People and Learning culture built on the belief that our collective knowledge is our most valuable asset, and our people are key to using this knowledge effectively. As a vital part of our culture, you will: Be proactive in becoming part of the team. Be a champion of collaborative work. Understand how your role contributes to the overall success of the company and ensure you have what you need to succeed. Learn from others, share what you know, and encourage knowledge exchange across the organization. Contribute to an outstanding organization that emphasizes quality, continuous improvement, and high performance through active participation in discussions and idea generation. QUALIFICATIONS To Meet Your Challenge, You Will Have: Bachelor’s degree or college diploma with 3–5 years of project management experience. Demonstrated experience managing software or web application development projects. Experience delivering increasingly complex projects and tailoring delivery approaches to the project context. Strong customer-engagement and relationship-building skills. Strong organizational, multitasking, and time-management abilities. Excellent verbal and written communication skills. Ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical audiences. Experience (formal or informal) in business analysis, including requirements elicitation and documentation. It Would Be Great If You Also Have: CAPM or PMP certification Knowledge of Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) Experience with project management tools (JIRA, Confluence, MS Project, MS SharePoint, MS Teams) Understanding of QA processes and continuous improvement practices. PEOPLE & LEARNING CULTURE We have a very strong People and Learning culture built on the belief that our collective knowledge is our most valuable asset, and our people are key to using this knowledge effectively. As a vital part of our culture, you will: Be proactive in becoming part of the team. Be a champion of collaborative work. Understand how your role contributes to the overall success of the company and ensure you have what you need to succeed. Learn from others, share what you know, and encourage knowledge exchange across the organization. Contribute to an outstanding organization that emphasizes quality, continuous improvement, and high performance through active participation in discussions and idea generation. BENEFITS We offer a generous compensation package with benefits that include: USD salary Comprehensive Health, Dental, and Life Insurance 15+ days of paid time-off Telecommuting (Hybrid) Learning allowance Gym allowance Travelling Allowance* Internet service allowance Breakfast Essentials Available Gaming lounge A flexible, diverse, and inclusive work environment that respects you APPLICATION If, after reading the above, you feel inspired and believe that you can make a significant contribution to our team, we would love to hear from you. Application deadline: February 26th, 2026 Ref: Project Manager Log in or register to apply

title: RealDecoy
description: RealDecoy RealDecoy is your web development partner. Our strength lies in planning, managing and developing top quality web solutions that help you to achieve your business objectives. After a decade in business, we have both the capacity and a proven record for handling projects of every size. No matter what the project, our team of talented and versatile professionals has the creativity, experience and expertise to get the job done right. Our area of expertise covers the entire spectrum of web technologies: Web Strategy, User Experience Design, Information Access Software, Content Management and Custom Application Development. While we are official partners of leading best-of-breed software companies, we maintain a technology–neutral approach, working with our clients to identify the technologies best suited to their needs. Our approach is built around a strong understanding of your business. We focus on achieving your business objectives with the right application of technology and we back it up with professional project management and long-term customer support. RealDecoy has developed web solutions for multiple needs, objectives, and situations. Having worked on many projects with government, corporations, and not-for-profit organizations, RealDecoy has established a reputation for quality work and commitment to service.
